sections.title: Trying to walk through the door without talking to Molly first

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.text: Wait! Do you know what you're doing here?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I know, I've been here before.

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.text: Well good luck then!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Erm, no I don't actually.

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.text: Well, come on over and I'll fill you in on what happened.

sections.title: Talking to her after first arriving
Talking to her again before entering the other room

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do I have to do again?

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.text: One more time then.

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.text: Through that door is a room with cage and a control panel that operates a giant mechanical claw.

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.text: I lured my sister into the room so I can imprison her in the cage by using the claw. The problem is my sister managed to herd some innocent civilians in there with her.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what do you need me to do?

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.text: I need you to go next door and use the claw to catch my sister.

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.text: Once she's in prison she wont be causing me anymore bother!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds easy enough to me.

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.text: Fabulous! Now take a good long look at me because the door will be locked behind you. My twin looks exactly like me, even her clothes!

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.text: One more thing to make your life difficult; the magic powering the claw is running low so you'll only have two attempts to catch her.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll do my best then!

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.text: By the way, would you like me to run through the controls for you, or do you think you'll manage?

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.text: Thanks for coming!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's the problem then?

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.text: It's my evil twin sister! She's been galavanting around Gielinor committing crimes and now I'm getting the blame!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well what's all this got to do with me then?

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.text: I'm glad you asked!

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.text: Through that door is a room with a cage and a control panel that operates a giant mechanical claw.

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.text: I lured my sister into the room so I could imprison her in the cage by using the claw. The problem is my sister managed to herd some innocent civilians in there with her.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what do you need me to do?

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.text: I need you to go next door and use the claw to catch my sister.

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.text: Once she's in prison, she won't be causing me anymore bother!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds easy enough to me.

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.text: Fabulous! Now take a good long look at me because the door will be locked behind you. My twin looks exactly like me, even her clothes!

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.text: One more thing to make your life difficult; the magic powering the claw is running low so you'll only have two attempts to catch her.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll do my best then!

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.text: By the way, would you like me to run through the controls for you, or do you think you'll manage?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please. I mean, it's always best to be prepared, right?

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.text: Ok, when you turn the machine on you'll see the glowing mark on the floor where the claw is currently aiming, and you'll see a lever and button on the right hand side of your screen.

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.text: To move the claw's current location, click on the direction you want it to move in, as indicated on the right hand panel.

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.text: You'll know which way the claw will go as the lever will point that way to show you.

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.text: When you see someone on top of the glowing mark, then hit the button on the right hand panel, as this will send the claw down to pick them up.

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.text: Do be careful and make sure that there is someone on the mark, and not just walking past it.

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.text: Oh, and make sure that the person is my sister, so you don't end up catching a random civilian.

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.text: Does that help?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, that covers everything. Thanks!

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.text: Good luck!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, thanks. I should be able to work it out.

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.text: Good luck!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I want to leave.

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.text: Fine. And there I was thinking you'd help.

sections.title: Trying to walk back through the door before catching the twin

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.text: You need to finish grabbing my twin before you come back through!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But I want to leave.

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.text: Fine. And there I was thinking you'd help.

sections.title: Clicking "Grab" on the civilians instead of using the claw

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.text: You need to use the control panel to use the claw!

sections.title: Talking to her after failing to get the evil twin

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Err, sorry. I seem to have messed it up a little.

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.text: Such incompetence! I should never have asked a baboon like you to do a complex task like this!

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.text: Get out of my sight!

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.text: Well, you tried your best I suppose. Come next door and talk to me.

sections.title: Talking to her after successfully capturing the evil twin

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I've managed to get her into the cage.

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.text: Fantastic! For so many years I've had to put up with her and now she's locked up for good.

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.text: Thank you for all your help. Take this as a reward.

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.text: Well done! You managed to catch my sister!

lines.speaker: Molly
lines.text: Come next door and talk to me.
